name: Local Signal Websites
positioning: Custom websites for artists, creators, small businesses, and local brands without template lock-in.
audience: Artists, creators, service businesses, local brands, and small teams that need a site they own.
voice: Helpful, technical but approachable, small-business friendly, ownership-focused, simple, honest.
visualStyle: Website screenshots, homepage audits, local search checklists, clean before/after structure.
postingFrequency: 3 posts weekly plus GBP updates for active local campaigns.
ctaOptions: Ask what your homepage is missing.
imageStyleRules: Show website sections, audit marks, and local trust signals.
Keep copy short enough for mobile.
promptGuardrails: Tie local visibility to ownership and clarity.
sampleHooks: Your homepage has one job before it has a design job.
A local website should answer four questions fast.
